description: The PBS_DisplaceMetallic component can displace the vertices of a mesh in the direction of the vertex's normal via the VertexDisplaceMap settings and the WorldSpaceVertexOffsetMap.
usage: The PBS Displace Metallic shader can displace the vertices of a mesh in the direction of the vertex's normal via the VertexDisplaceMap settings and the WorldSpaceVertexOffsetMap.
